name: AutoPod Multicam Edit
description: Auto-edit a multicam podcast or interview. Discovers cameras + microphones in the active timeline, optionally uses AI vision to map mic-to-camera, then cuts the edit locally with Voice Activity Detection. Produces a new timeline with the cuts applied.

inputs.name: app_target
inputs.label: Target NLE
inputs.description: Which editor to drive. AutoPod supports both Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve via FCP7 XML.

inputs.name: use_generative
inputs.label: AI mic-to-camera mapping
inputs.description: If on, uses Gemini vision to auto-map each microphone to the camera that best frames its speaker. If off, drops in a fallback mapping you can edit later.

inputs.name: fallback_track
inputs.label: Fallback video track
inputs.description: Track ID to use when no microphone is active (e.g. 'V1'). Optional.

capabilities.description: DaVinci Resolve or Premiere Pro must be connected — AutoPod drives the active editor.
